inputs.label: Length
inputs.businessContext: Length of the concrete element (e.g., slab, beam). Based on structural engineering standards (ACI 318).

inputs.label: Width
inputs.businessContext: Width of the concrete element. ACI 318.

inputs.label: Height (Thickness)
inputs.businessContext: Height or thickness of the concrete element. ACI 318.

inputs.label: Shape
inputs.businessContext: Cross-sectional shape of the element. For circular, diameter is used; for custom, additional inputs may be needed.

inputs.label: Number of identical elements
inputs.businessContext: Count of identical concrete elements to calculate total volume.

inputs.label: Waste Factor
inputs.businessContext: Additional concrete allowance for waste, spillage, and over-excavation. Typical range 5-10% per ACI 304R.

inputs.label: Concrete unit cost
inputs.businessContext: Cost per cubic meter of concrete mix. Varies by region and mix design.

rules: If shape is 'circular', diameter must be > 0 and length, width, height must be 0.
If shape is 'rectangular', length, width, height must be > 0 and diameter must be 0.
If shape is 'custom', additional inputs may be required (not implemented).
length, width, height, diameter must be non-negative.

thresholds.wasteFactor > 10: Warning: High waste factor may indicate inefficiency.
thresholds.unitCost > 200: Warning: Concrete cost is above typical market range.

formulas.netVolume: shape === 'rectangular' ? length * width * height : shape === 'circular' ? Math.PI * (diameter/2)**2 * height : 0

suggestedActions: wasteFactor > 10 ? 'Review concrete placement procedures to reduce waste.' : ''
unitCost > 200 ? 'Consider alternative suppliers or mix designs.' : ''
